_comment: AI Provider Registry — defines all supported AI backends for shua_diary. Each entry is a provider type. The 'config_schema' drives the Flutter config dialog (rendered as SDUI primitives by the module governor). Selecting a provider type shows only the fields relevant to that type. Stored config is saved in module_config SQLite table with key 'ai_provider_config'.

cloud.label: Cloud API
cloud.description: Any hosted LLM API (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, etc.)

ollama_rpi5.label: Ollama on Pi 5
ollama_rpi5.description: Ollama LLM server hosted on your Raspberry Pi 5

ollama_host.label: Ollama (Local Machine)
ollama_host.description: Ollama running natively on this Windows machine (localhost)

python_semantics.label: Python Semantics (No LLM)
python_semantics.description: Sentiment analysis and NLP via Python scripts — no LLM required. Responses are rule-based.

n8n.label: n8n Workflow (Pi 5)
n8n.description: Route diary AI requests through n8n automation workflows on the Pi 5
n8n.disabled_reason: n8n integration not yet configured. Set up n8n on Pi 5 to enable.
